title: Section 151
content: 1[151. Power to call for information.--- The Commissioner or an officer authorised by him may, by an order, direct any person to furnish information relating to any matter dealt with in connection with this Act, within such time, in such form, and in such manner, as may be specified therein.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 2021, s. 119, for section 151 (w.e.f. 1-1-2022).
